ABOUT.HEADING: Why me
ABOUT.CONTENT: My journey into web development began during my training as a computer science teacher. Since then, I have been passionate about creating well-structured and functional applications. Using an analytical approach, I develop user-friendly solutions that excel both technically and visually.

SKILLS.HEADING: My Skills
SKILLS.FOCUS_TEXT: Whether deep backend logic or interactive frontend – I am constantly learning to implement innovative solutions with the right technologies.

PROJECTS.HEADING: Projects

ABOUT_TEXT.EL_POLLO_LOCO: A simple Jump-and-Run game based on an object-oriented approach. Help Pepe defeat El Pollo Loco! Throw salsa bottles or jump on small chickens. Collect all the coins!
ABOUT_TEXT.POKEDEX: A dynamic web application that allows users to explore and search for Pokémon. It fetches and displays detailed data, such as stats, types, and images, directly from the PokéAPI in real-time.
ABOUT_TEXT.JOIN: Task manager inspired by the Kanban System. Create and organize tasks using drag and drop functions, assign users and categories.
ABOUT_TEXT.ONGOING: I am currently expanding my expertise in Angular and learning to implement sophisticated architectures for larger applications. My goal is to develop features that are both technically brilliant and user-friendly.

PROJECTS.WORK_PROCESS: How I have organised my work process

WORK_PROCESS_TEXT.EL_POLLO_LOCO: Focused on modular class structures and inheritance. Ensured clean code via descriptive naming, JSDoc, and a strict logic-UI separation.
WORK_PROCESS_TEXT.POKEDEX: Learned how to efficiently fetch and process large amounts of JSON data using asynchronous JavaScript (Promises, async/await). Improved my dynamic UI design skills, particularly by implementing pagination features and responsive grid layouts.
WORK_PROCESS_TEXT.JOIN: I rely on modular components and a clear separation of logic and design. By using descriptive naming and clean documentation, the code remains easily maintainable and scalable for others.

LEARN_TEXT.EL_POLLO_LOCO: Deepened my Vanilla JavaScript skills with a focus on Object-Oriented Programming (OOP). Mastered complex collision logic, game physics, and fluid animations without frameworks.
LEARN_TEXT.POKEDEX: Deepened my understanding of asynchronous API calls and learned how to implement a smooth search functionality across complex datasets. Furthermore, I expanded my dynamic DOM manipulation skills to create engaging, interactive detail views and modals on the fly.
LEARN_TEXT.JOIN: As part of a small development team, I programmed the core features. The close collaboration showed me how teamwork can efficiently overcome complex technical challenges.

CONTACT.HEADING: Contact me
CONTACT.MESSAGE: Feel free to contact me anytime regarding job offers or exciting opportunities as a Fullstack Developer. I am particularly interested in projects involving web development, scalable applications, and modern software architectures.
